  • 类
    类
    说明
    AdminJobServlet
    Servlet that lets administrators create and update job postings.
    AdminStudentListServlet
    Servlet that loads the student list view for administrators.
    AiMatchEngine
    Central service for AI-based student-to-job matching with simple file-backed caching.
    AiMatchEngine.MatchResult
    内部类：统一的返回结果结构
    ApplyCompanyServlet
    Servlet that processes company application submissions.
    ApplyJobServlet
    Servlet that submits a student job application and returns the outcome.
    DeleteStudentServlet
    Servlet that removes a student record.
    DownloadResumeServlet
    Servlet that streams an uploaded student resume to the client.
    GetAiScoreServlet
    Servlet that calculates or retrieves the AI match score for a student and job.
    LoginServlet
    Servlet that authenticates users and starts the appropriate web session.
    LogoutServlet
    Servlet that ends the current user session.
    MOAiMatchServlet
    Servlet that runs AI matching for applicants of a module organizer job.
    MOJobServlet
    Servlet that lists and manages jobs created by module organizers.
    MOLogoutServlet
    Servlet that logs a module organizer out by invalidating the current session.
    MORegisterServlet
    Servlet that registers a new module organizer account.
    MyApplicationsServlet
    Servlet that loads the current student applications page.
    MyApplicationsServlet.Application
     
    RegistrationRules
    Shared validation rules used during public registration flows.
    StudentJobServlet
    学生职位列表 Servlet 负责展示系统中所有发布的职位，供学生（TA 申请者）查看和筛选
    StudentProfileApiServlet
    REST-style servlet for reading and saving the logged-in student's profile data.
    StudentProfileServlet
    Servlet that loads the profile page for either the current student or a selected student record.
    StudentRegisterServlet
    Servlet that registers a new student account.
    StudentResumeUploadServlet
     
    UpdateApplicationServlet
    Servlet that updates the status of an application.
    UpdateCompanyServlet
    Servlet that updates company information.
    UpdateStudentServlet
    Servlet that updates student information.
